titleStmt.title: SII 28.80: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 80. (A.R. No. 78 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, second gōpuram, left of entrance.

p.hi: Vīra-Viruppaṇṇa-uḍaiyār Śaka 1320, Pramāthi, Mēsha ba. 12, Friday, UttiraṭṭAdi, Irregular.
p.note: Cf. A.R.Ep. 1913. The Śaka date has been doubtfully read as 1322. But in the relevant place of the inscription of the record, there is not even space for a 2 in the unit column. Even then, it is observed that it was only 1321 which corresponded to the cyclic year Pramāthi. L.D.S. Pillai has taken the Śaka year quoted as the one expired and has equated the details to 1399 A.D., May 2, f.d.t. 26; f.d.m. 31; (A.R. Ep., 1914 p. 62, The serial number of the record in the list is wrongly given as 79).

summary.p: Records that it was instructed that the festival on the day of the asterism Bharaṇi that was celebrated in honour of God Uttarāpati-Nāyakar (in Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi in the vaḍakāl of Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu till then (see No. 79 above) should henceforward be done in honour of Gaṇapatiraiyān (obviously) God [Ga]ṇapatīśvara, whose shrine in the same temple competed with the shrine of God Uttarāpatīśvara for pre-eminence). It is not clear to at whose instance the old arrangement was changed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti[śrī.*]śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇḍaliśvara
śrīviraviruppaṇṇa Uṭaiyar
kkuc cellā niṉṟa cakāptam
10 3[2 10]ṉ mel pramāti varuṣam
meṣa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu dvā
daśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ keyamā
ṇikkavaḷanāṭu vaṭakāl tirucceṅ
kāṭṭaṅkuṭi nāyaṉār Uttarāpa
ti nāyakarkku nāḷatu varaiyum naṭanta ci
ttirait tirupparaṇi Aṟpacit tiruppara
ṇit tirunāḷ palar tirunāḷumāka naṭa
nta (1/2) kaṇataraiyār taṅkaḷ tirunā
kaṭaitta veṇum Eṉṟu collukaiyi
intak koyilil naṭakkum tirunāḷ Uḷa
tukaṇapataraiyār tirunāḷ Āka naṭakka E
ṉṟu t tirunāḷka
ḷukkut tirukkāroḷat ti
runāḷ mutalākat tīttam Aḷavākat tirunāḷ pat
tu nāḷukkum homa [ drai] vyam navarattātikaḷ tiru
kkāppu nāṇ tirupparivaṭṭaṅkaḷ tirumeṟ pūc
cu tiruccāttu pannir kuṅkumam kaṟpūram ka
sturi Amutupaṭi Amutu tirucceṅkaḻunir tiru
viḷakkeṇṇai mutalāka [�]
vil tirunāḷ cilavukku veṇṭumavai Ellām
Aḻivaṟa kuṟaivaṟuttut taṅkaḷukku Uṭaiya va
kaiyile tu Aruḷukiṟa tāṅkaḷum peStops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
